character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member involved in a mutiny, engages in dialogue with Jim Hawkins and the sea-cook.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: A buccaneer and crew leader who interacts with Jim Hawkins, discusses the ship's fate, and references a Bible-cut black spot.

character_dossiers.name: Jim Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: A first-person narrator involved in a mutiny plot, engages in dialogue with Silver and the sea-cook.

character_dossiers.name: Morgan
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who participates in a council and comments on the black spot.

character_dossiers.name: George
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who participates in a council and references the black spot.

character_dossiers.name: Dick
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member accused of cutting a Bible for the black spot.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A figure referenced in the crew's mutiny plot, not directly described.

character_dossiers.name: the sea-cook
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who interacts with Jim Hawkins, discusses the ship's fate, and references a Bible-cut black spot.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: A figure referenced in the crew's plot, mentioned in relation to a chart.
